headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) After Recent Price Rebound?
summary: If you are wondering whether Keurig Dr Pepper at around US$28.56 is priced attractively or not, the key is to look under the hood of what the current market value actually reflects. The stock has moved around recently, with a 1.3% decline over the last 7 days but an 11.1% gain over the last 30 days, while the 1 year return sits at a 13.3% decline and the year to date return is 3.0%. Recent coverage has focused on Keurig Dr Pepper as a large beverage player in the US market, with investors...
